{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170038459CA7D9B753F08063FB"}"},"total":1458},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7467640622624752409","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"家人们，信我这本书超级好看，文章的逻辑、内容、主角的性格都塑造的非常好，主角强大不圣母，感情细腻，非常推荐[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738706007,"group_id":"7430729817290460184","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人丰富，无法简介","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5+oK4yAxtZ/AbL7QmzkGOk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10f542dfe53847ac91cd8274fe8e651b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795795&x-signature=YJzn7quaOgGYAMBlHTie%2FWn2dUY%3D","user_id":"99014354286","user_name":"奶酪柠檬酥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99014354286","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744534088,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7430729817290460184","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+酒剑仙+玩剑+不刀+酒疯+轻微日常】
李无量穿越斩神世界，成为了林七夜的同学，又因为嗜酒症兼职病友。
从17岁开始，他每次打招呼直接变了画风。
“老弟，睁眼没？”
林七夜：“脚让一让。”
李无量“睁眼了？！”
林七夜：“习惯了。”
直到这一日，喝够了一万瓶酒的李轩终于激活了酒剑仙代理人系统！
酒越好，剑越快！
喝越久，剑越利！
击败的敌人越强，获得的酒也越好！
总结，喝酒就变强，一剑开天！
古神教会，外邦神明？
酒管够，神也揍！
赵空城：“我和那个酒蒙子的初次相遇没什么好说的，他喝蒙了乱丢酒瓶，给我砸了！”
林七夜：“他一句让我的猴帮他酿酒，大圣的自闭症就变成了狂躁症。”
李无量：“我有一剑，可开天，平山，断海，斩神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4235d73549ea73a813e9bf496d570a77","author":"骄傲的凉面","author_id":"","book_id":"7430729817290460184","book_name":"斩神：大夏酒剑仙，剑开天门！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7430729865097134616","read_count":"42645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1876559"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"863","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fb110b6024aa976852bd35e8bd56f32d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440438&x-signature=DMvLMgf8hddzMNF9arxEomrCz9A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1719269744455773","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"246"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170038459CA7D9B753F08063FB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarde
